description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with a white exterior and a dark, multi-gabled roof. The front features a double garage with wooden doors, a covered entryway, and a mix of rectangular and square windows. The rear of the house is dominated by tall, floor-to-ceiling windows and glass doors, suggesting a spacious, open-plan living area with ample natural light. The side elevations show a combination of single and double windows, with the roofline varying in height and complexity. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with wooden and glass accents. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on symmetry and functional outdoor access.
description: A large, modern white house with a dark, multi-gabled roof, double garage, and expansive windows, blending contemporary and suburban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage with wooden doors, main entryway, and a mix of window shapes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, a row of rectangular windows, and the depth of the garage wing.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by tall, floor-to-ceiling windows and glass doors, emphasizing openness and light.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the complex roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows at the rear
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a recessed door, flanked by windows and a prominent double garage with wooden doors
